title: Overloaded column named "ROWID" mishandled in triggers.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_sqlite_r(a INTEGER, ROWID INTEGER);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_sqlite_r_ai AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_sqlite_r BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_sqlite_r(a, ROWID) VALUES (new.a + 1, new.ROWID + 1); END;
SELECT rowid, a, ROWID FROM fuzz_sqlite_r;
